speaker: charlie
text: G'day, I'm Alex Mercer and this is ParkSyde Bright Side, where we focus on the good news that matters to Queensland. Jamie's here with me as usual, and mate, what a day to be talking about renewables.

speaker: alice
text: Too right Alex! We've got some absolutely brilliant news coming out of Australia and the world today. From groundbreaking battery tech to sports excellence, this Thursday is delivering the goods.

speaker: charlie
text: Couldn't agree more. We'll dive into all the green energy wins, some fascinating science breakthroughs, and the latest in Australian sport. Plus Sam's got your SE Queensland weather forecast coming up.
